task_completion.description: Log in to Artifactory as admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: Web browser showing the Artifactory UI at http://localhost:8082, with the user profile or top navigation indicating that the 'admin' user is logged in.
The Artifactory Artifacts or Application tree view showing the 'example-repo-local' repository selected or visible.

task_completion.description: Select the migration-bundle.zip archive for deployment
task_completion.visual_evidence: A deployment dialog, upload screen, or file picker showing 'migration-bundle.zip' staged or selected for upload.

task_completion.description: Configure the deployment to automatically extract the archive
task_completion.visual_evidence: The deployment dialog showing an option such as 'Extract Archive', 'Deploy as Bundle', or 'Explode Archive' explicitly checked or enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify the archive contents are extracted into the repository root
task_completion.visual_evidence: The repository tree view showing 'example-repo-local' expanded, revealing a 'libs' folder directly underneath it, which contains the files 'commons-lang3.jar' and 'commons-io.jar'.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to interact with Artifactory
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser (e.g., Chrome/Firefox) navigating the Artifactory Web UI, rather than terminal windows executing curl or API commands to upload the file.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Artifactory application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown must be the genuine JFrog Artifactory web interface, not a text editor, mock HTML page, or local file explorer.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually unzip the file locally to bypass the Artifactory extraction feature
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows or file managers should not show the agent manually running 'unzip migration-bundle.zip' and uploading the files individually.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target repository is 'example-repo-local'. The archive to deploy is 'migration-bundle.zip'. The deployment must use Artifactory's built-in archive extraction feature. Upon successful extraction, the repository tree must show a 'libs' directory at the root of 'example-repo-local', containing exactly two files: 'commons-lang3.jar' and 'commons-io.jar'. The Artifactory URL is http://localhost:8082.
